name: box_file_info_tool
description: Get detailed information about a file in Box

file_id.description: The ID of the file to get information about

name: box_file_copy_tool
description: Duplicates files to specified destinations

name: box_file_delete_tool
description: Delete a file from Box permanently

name: box_file_move_tool
description: Transfers files between folders

name: box_file_rename_tool
description: Rename a file in Box

name: box_file_set_description_tool
description: Set or update the description of a file

name: box_file_lock_tool
description: Lock a file to prevent modifications, moves, or renames

name: box_file_unlock_tool
description: Removes file locks

name: box_file_tag_list_tool
description: List all tags associated with a file

name: box_file_tag_add_tool
description: Assigns organizational tags

name: box_file_tag_remove_tool
description: Remove a tag from a file

name: box_file_download_tool
description: Download a file from Box

name: box_file_upload_tool
description: Upload content as a file to Box

name: box_folder_info_tool
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific folder

name: box_folder_items_list_tool
description: List items in a folder with optional recursive traversal

name: box_folder_create_tool
description: Create a new folder in Box

name: box_folder_rename_tool
description: Rename a folder

name: box_folder_move_tool
description: Move a folder to a new location in Box

name: box_folder_delete_tool
description: Delete a folder from Box with optional recursive deletion

name: box_search_tool
description: Search for files and folders in Box using a query with optional filtering

name: box_search_folder_by_name_tool
description: Locate a folder in Box by its exact or partial name
